text_original: I like the platform. The memory is great. The interactions are good. I'm able to create a storyline. as I interact with this the story goes back and forth between me and the main character but it actually will develop the conversation of other people in our storyline and give them voice so it's kind of a cool narrative I don't know how better to explain it but I really do think that this is one of the better apps out there. I have messed around with quite a few of them this one really works well
text_zh: 我喜欢这个平台。记忆功能很棒，互动体验也很好。我能够创造出一个故事情节。随着我的互动，故事在我与主角之间来回展开，但它实际上还会发展故事线中其他人的对话并赋予他们声音，所以这是一种很酷的叙事方式，我不知道该怎么更好地解释，但我真的认为这是目前市面上更好的应用之一。我尝试过不少同类应用，这个真的运行得很好。
reply_original: Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! It is amazing to hear how much you enjoy the narrative depth and the way the AI gives voice to side characters in your storyline. We strive to create a truly immersive experience, and knowing we stand out among other apps is the best fuel for us.
reply_zh: 哇，读到您的留言让我们整个团队都开心极了！听到您如此喜欢故事的叙事深度，以及 AI 为您故事线中的配角赋予生命力的方式，我们感到非常欣慰。我们一直致力于打造真正沉浸式的体验，得知我们在众多应用中脱颖而出，是对我们最大的鼓舞。
